name: UptimeRobot
description: UptimeRobot monitors website and API uptime by checking endpoints at regular intervals and alerting on downtime. Create, manage, and query monitors for HTTP, keyword, ping, and port checks. Note: all API requests use POST method, and the API key is passed in the request body rather than in headers.

capabilities.name: get_monitors
capabilities.description: Retrieve all monitors with their current status, uptime ratios, response times, and optional log history. The API key must be included in the POST body.

capabilities.name: create_monitor
capabilities.description: Create a new uptime monitor for a URL or IP address. Supports HTTP(s), keyword, ping, and port monitor types.

capabilities.name: edit_monitor
capabilities.description: Edit an existing monitor's settings including URL, friendly name, monitoring interval, and alert contacts.

capabilities.name: delete_monitor
capabilities.description: Permanently delete an existing monitor by its ID.

capabilities.name: get_alert_contacts
capabilities.description: List all alert contacts configured in the account, including email, SMS, webhook, and integration contacts.

capabilities.name: get_account_details
capabilities.description: Retrieve account information including plan type, monitor limits, and usage statistics.
